[[BLOCK:p_13]]
Student Learning Progress: Enhancing learning efficiency, mechanisms of habit formation, intervention for learning aversion, and the development of the Precision Learning 3.0 AI-Assisted System (精准学习3.0 AI辅助系统).

[[BLOCK:p_14]]
Academic Achievements

[[BLOCK:p_15]]
Participation in Major Projects

[[BLOCK:p_16]]
Ministry of Education Standardization Project: Adolescent Exam Anxiety Early Warning and Intervention System (考试焦虑预警干预系统) - A demonstrative study based on the individual-relationship-microenvironment three-dimensional matching model. (2016-2018) Project Leader.

[[BLOCK:p_17]]
Beijing Municipal Education Commission Key Social Science Project: Assessment, Early Warning, and Intervention Demonstration Project for Bullying Behavior in Beijing Primary and Secondary Schools. (2018-2021) Project Leader.

[[BLOCK:p_18]]
National Natural Science Foundation General Project: Behavioral and neural mechanism research on the application effects of Cognitive Bias Correction Techniques (认知偏差矫正技术) in individuals with depressive cognitive vulnerability. (2018-2022) Project Leader.

[[BLOCK:p_19]]
National Natural Science Youth Fund Project: Application of the "Weakest Link" Hypothesis in Screening for Depressive Cognitive Vulnerability: New evidence from multi-phase tracking and cognitive neural mechanisms. (2013-2016) Project Leader.

[[BLOCK:p_20]]
Beijing Youth League Horizontal Project: Mental Health Blue Book (心理健康蓝皮书) - A study on stressors among Beijing adolescents and the mental health status of high school graduates. (2015-2016) Project Leader.

[[BLOCK:p_21]]
Beijing Philosophy and Social Science Planning Project: Beijing Basic Education Research Base - Construction of a model for identifying top talent in new teacher recruitment for basic education. (2013-2015) Project Leader.
